title: Refreshed Chests
description: Gives a Fresh New Look to the Chest Textures and Models. Minecraft Dungeons Inspired
body:
# Refreshed Chests

**Refreshes** the Chest's **Texture and Model** to a **More Modern/Up to Date** look, almost as Fresh **as if it was Introduced in the Latest Update!**

Inspired by Minecraft Dungeons Chests

⚠ **[Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads)/[EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) Required | Do note that Christmas Chests will not appear on Christmas** ⚠

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yZcv1ZlL/images/84ae731332771ed00465fecce4d63771e027e5e0.png)
![Jungle Pyramid Chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f20b1a5f50339c7a3c9af2c4362c5b2a522ce23.png)
![End City Chests](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yZcv1ZlL/images/a6ed726f60d6cff1ae91041633f747067b78e638.png)
![Ocean Monument and Pale Oak Chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yZcv1ZlL/images/d14a7a303033acf08313231d857734ed6f648667.png)
